name: Lawnmower Game: Next Generation
developer: Tero Lunkka, Valkeala Software, Black Thug
short_description: New low poly version for legendary saga. New different unlocked mowers. Be a king of Lawnmowers and cut all grass with all mowers
detailed_description:
FIND HMUR!


About the Game

Story:


Lawnmover game where player drive lawnmower and cut grass in big open world which contain grass, and lot of different obstacles. Lawnmower has fuel consumption and player can play for 4 different mowers. Those can be unlocked after several tasks. Also game contains weather and day/night cycle and of course lot of grass to cut. Player can unlock different mowers by driving enough and long distances. Also steam achievements added
Can you be the king of all lawnmowers and cut all grass!!

Features:

- 4 different mowers
- Green lawnmower
- Orange lawnmower
- Sweeper lawnmower
- Turbo lawnmower
- unlocked mowers
- weather system
- day/night system
- lot of grass

Planned updates:

- more grass
- more different areas
